problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
